2604.18964.title: DW-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs on Data Warehouse Graph Topology Reasoning
2604.18964.paper_summary: This paper introduces DW-Bench, a new benchmark that evaluates large language models (LLMs) on graph-topology reasoning over data warehouse schemas, explicitly integrating both foreign-key (FK) and data-lineage edges. The benchmark comprises 1,046 automatically generated, verifiably correct questions across five schemas. Experiments show that tool-augmented methods substantially outperform static approaches but plateau on hard compositional subtypes.
2604.18964.paper_summary_zh: 本文介紹了 DW-Bench，一個新的基準，用於評估大型語言模型（LLMs）在數據倉庫架構上的圖拓撲推理，明確整合了外鍵（FK）和數據血緣邊。該基準包含 1,046 個自動生成的、可驗證正確的問題，涵蓋五個架構。實驗顯示，工具增強方法的表現顯著優於靜態方法，但在困難的組合子類型上達到平臺期。
2604.18964.author: Ahmed G. A. H Ahmed et.al.
2604.18964.authors: Ahmed G. A. H Ahmed, C. Okan Sakar
